mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS studyId, s.name AS studyName, s.description, t.name AS topicName, pt.name AS parentTopicName, f.name AS formatName, s.difficulty, s.study_type AS studyType, s.meeting_type AS meetingType, s.schedule_days AS scheduleDays, s.schedule_time AS scheduleTime, s.schedule_summary AS scheduleSummary, s.max_members AS maxMembers, member_cnt.cnt AS currentMembers, s.status, s.start_date AS startDate, s.end_date AS endDate, s.recruit_end_date AS recruitEndDate, s.goal, s.textbook, s.leader_id AS leaderId, leader.nickname AS leaderNickname, lp.profile_image_url AS leaderProfileImage, COALESCE(lr_stats.avg_rating, 0) AS leaderAvgRating, COALESCE(lr_stats.review_count, 0) AS leaderReviewCount, COALESCE(sched_match.match_count, 0) AS scheduleMatchCount, 0 AS techMatchCount, 0 AS topicMatchCount, ( COALESCE(sched_match.match_count, 0) * 7 + COALESCE(lr_stats.avg_rating, 0) * 3 + CASE WHEN s.max_members > 0 THEN ((s.max_members - COALESCE(member_cnt.cnt, 0)) * 2.0 / s.max_members) ELSE 0 END ) AS matchingScore
FROM study s JOIN topic t ON s.topic_id = t.id LEFT JOIN topic pt ON t.parent_id = pt.id LEFT JOIN format f ON s.format_id = f.id JOIN `user` leader ON s.leader_id = leader.id LEFT JOIN profile lp ON leader.id = lp.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT study_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM study_member WHERE status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY study_id ) member_cnt ON s.id = member_cnt.study_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT leader_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM study_leader_review GROUP BY leader_id ) lr_stats ON s.leader_id = lr_stats.leader_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s4.id AS study_id, COUNT(DISTINCT us.day_of_week) AS match_count FROM study s4 JOIN user_schedule us ON us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.is_available = TRUE WHERE s4.schedule_days IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(us.day_of_week, REPLACE(s4.schedule_days, ' ', '')) > 0 GROUP BY s4.id ) sched_match ON s.id = sched_match.study_id
WHERE s.status = 'RECRUITING' AND s.is_public = TRUE AND (s.max_members IS NULL OR COALESCE(member_cnt.cnt, 0) < s.max_members) AND s.leader_id != #{userId} /* 토픽 필터: 해당 토픽 또는 같은 parent 아래 토픽 */ AND ( s.topic_id = #{topicId} OR t.parent_id = #{topicId} OR t.parent_id IN (SELECT id FROM topic WHERE parent_id = #{topicId}) OR t.parent_id = (SELECT parent_id FROM topic WHERE id = #{topicId}) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM study_member sm WHERE sm.study_id = s.id AND sm.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.status IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM study_application sa WHERE sa.study_id = s.id AND sa.user_id = #{userId} AND sa.status = 'PENDING' )
ORDER BY matchingScore DESC, s.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
